login.heading: Your place in paradise is waiting
login.sub: Access saved searches, manage your listings, and run ROI models — all in one place.

signup.sub: Free to join. Verified listings. A bilingual team that's lived the process.

toast.email_sent: Account created! Check your email for the verification code.

validation.name_min: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.password_min: Must be at least 8 characters long
validation.password_lowercase: Must contain at least one lowercase letter
validation.password_uppercase: Must contain at least one uppercase letter
validation.password_number: Must contain at least one number
validation.password_special: Must contain at least one special character
validation.terms_required: You must accept the terms to continue

forgot_password.heading: Forgot your password?
forgot_password.sub: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link if an account exists.
forgot_password.success_sub: If an account exists for that address, a reset link is on its way. Check your spam folder if you don't see it within a few minutes.
forgot_password.toast_error: Something went wrong — please try again

reset_password.heading: Reset your password
reset_password.sub: Enter a new password for your account.
reset_password.success_sub: Your password has been reset. You can now log in with your new password.
reset_password.err_invalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
reset_password.err_generic: Something went wrong — please try again
reset_password.expired_sub: Request a new one from the login page.
